stories.title: SpaceX prices record IPO as US inflation tops 4%
stories.summary: SpaceX is pricing what would be the largest IPO ever — a ~$75B raise at a $1.75T-plus valuation — the same day US consumer inflation crossed 4% for the first time in three years.

stories.title: House passes $70B immigration enforcement package
stories.summary: A border-security and ICE-funding bill cleared the House 214-212, ending a months-long standoff.

stories.title: US sanctions 11 over Iran weapons procurement
stories.summary: Treasury hit 11 people and entities accused of aiding Iran's Revolutionary Guard, in a campaign it called 'Economic Fury.'

stories.title: Judge blocks Alabama nitrogen-gas executions
stories.summary: A federal judge ruled the nitrogen method unconstitutionally cruel, permanently halting its use.

stories.title: Inflation hits 4% — highest in three years
stories.summary: A gasoline-price spike tied to the US-Israel war on Iran pushed CPI above 4%, pressuring the Fed on rate cuts.

stories.title: SpaceX IPO reserves big retail allocation
stories.summary: Ordinary investors get a sizeable slice as SpaceX targets a record-breaking debut today.

stories.title: Russia oil output falls to one-year low
stories.summary: Ukrainian drone strikes on energy infrastructure dragged Russian crude output to its lowest in a year.

stories.title: US solar + battery project lands $3.5B financing
stories.summary: A major clean-energy storage project secured $3.5B amid elevated energy prices.

stories.title: Anthropic files confidentially for IPO
stories.summary: Reports peg Anthropic at a ~$965B valuation on a ~$44B annualized run rate after a June 1 confidential filing.

stories.title: ChatGPT still leads chatbot traffic; Claude surges
stories.summary: June data: ChatGPT ~54.7% of AI-chatbot web visits, Gemini ~27.4%, Claude ~8.2% and climbing fast.

stories.title: Google unveils 'TurboQuant' for AI memory
stories.summary: A new algorithm cuts the KV-cache memory overhead that slows large AI models.

stories.title: Bitcoin bounces off lows toward $63K
stories.summary: BTC opened at $61,456 (-0.3%) then climbed to ~$63,020 by morning; ETH firmed to ~$1,660.

stories.title: BTC technicals flash oversold
stories.summary: With RSI near 23.8, indicators read oversold even as the broader 2026 trend stays cautious.

stories.title: Crypto firms on softer-than-feared macro
stories.summary: Bitcoin and ether recovered from recent lows after fresh US airstrikes and the hot CPI print.

stories.title: New immune mechanism for fighting cancer found
stories.summary: Researchers uncovered an unexpected way the immune system attacks tumors, upending a decades-old belief.

stories.title: New Alzheimer's target and blocking compound
stories.summary: Scientists identified a drug target and an experimental compound that halts a damaging process in brain cells.

stories.title: One photonic chip generates, steers & reads light
stories.summary: A single device handles light-based information end to end — a step toward ultra-fast, efficient computing.

stories.title: 'Amaterasu' cosmic ray may be a heavy nucleus
stories.summary: New analysis suggests the extreme particle is not a proton but an ultraheavy atomic nucleus.

stories.title: GLP-1 drugs linked to 30% lower breast-cancer risk
stories.summary: A large study found women on GLP-1 medications were ~30% less likely to develop breast cancer.

stories.title: AI-designed universal COVID vaccine passes first human test
stories.summary: An AI-designed pan-coronavirus vaccine was found safe and well tolerated in its first human trial.

stories.title: New drug targets KRAS in pancreatic cancer
stories.summary: Daraxonrasib goes after the KRAS mutation that drives most pancreatic cancers.

stories.title: Ultra-processed foods tied to slower thinking
stories.summary: A 2,100-adult study linked higher ultra-processed intake to poorer attention and processing speed.

stories.title: Knicks erase 29-point deficit, lead Finals 3-1
stories.summary: New York stunned San Antonio 107-106 after a historic comeback to take a commanding series lead.

stories.title: Scherzer becomes 11th pitcher to 3,500 strikeouts
stories.summary: The Blue Jays ace reached a rare milestone; elsewhere the Giants rallied from 8 down to beat Washington 11-10.

stories.title: Barcelona bids to host 2029 Champions League final
stories.summary: The club filed its full UEFA dossier; meanwhile Rashford's permanent move looks unlikely.

stories.title: Spielberg releases 34th film, 'Disclosure Day'
stories.summary: The director's new feature imagines the world reacting to full disclosure of alien-life evidence.

stories.title: Taylor Swift drops surprise song; Rodrigo album lands
stories.summary: A packed June for music as Swift releases a surprise track and Olivia Rodrigo puts out a new album.

stories.title: 'Schmigadoon!' and 'Liberation' win big at the Tonys
stories.summary: The 2026 Tony Awards crowned 'Schmigadoon!' Best Musical and 'Liberation' Best Play.
